svg:
<title id="title>Content Moderation Failure Modes <desc" id="desc">Content moderation failure modes: false positives, adversarial attacks, reviewer burnout, and policy inconsistency
<rect width="900" height="600" fill="var(--bg-panel, #f8fafc)/>
Content Moderation Failure Modes <text" x="450" y="58 text-anchor="middle" font-size="13 fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b)">False positives, adversarial attacks, reviewer burnout, and policy inconsistency
<text x="235 y="110" text-anchor="middle font-size="14" font-weight="bold fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444">1. False Positives (Over-moderation)
<text x="130 y="175" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="white>Legitimate Content <text" x="130" y="190 text-anchor="middle" font-size="8 fill="#6ee7b7">Educational <text x="130 y="203" text-anchor="middle font-size="7" fill="#6ee7b7>Medical context
<text x="220 y="170" text-anchor="middle font-size="7" fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444>ML flags
<rect" x="245" y="150 width="140" height="60" rx="4" fill="var(--bg-theme, #ef4444)" stroke="var(--border-theme, #b91c1c)" stroke-width="2/> <text" x="315" y="175 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="white">BLOCKED <text x="315 y="190" text-anchor="middle font-size="8" fill="#fca5a5>NSFW detected <text" x="315" y="203 text-anchor="middle" font-size="7 fill="#fca5a5">No context
<text x="235 y="290" text-anchor="middle font-size="10" fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444>Legitimate content removed, user frustrated! <text" x="235" y="310 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b">Cause: ML lacks context, threshold too sensitive <text x="235 y="330" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="var(--text-theme, #10b981>Fix: Human review for borderline, appeals process
<rect" x="460" y="85 width="410" height="240" rx="8" fill="white" stroke="var(--border-theme, #f59e0b)" stroke-width="2/> 2. Adversarial Attacks
<rect" x="480" y="135 width="370" height="140" rx="6" fill="var(--bg-panel-soft, #fffbeb)" stroke="var(--border-theme, #fcd34d)" stroke-width="1/>
<rect" x="490" y="150 width="120" height="60" rx="4" fill="var(--bg-theme, #ef4444)" stroke="var(--border-theme, #b91c1c)" stroke-width="2/> <text" x="550" y="175 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="white">Attacker <text x="550 y="190" text-anchor="middle font-size="8" fill="#fca5a5>Adapts content <text" x="550" y="203 text-anchor="middle" font-size="7 fill="#fca5a5">Evades detection
<line x1="615 y1="180" x2="645 y2="180" stroke="var(--text-theme, #ef4444)" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow-red)/> Bypasses
<text x="747 y="175" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="white>Evasion Techniques <text" x="747" y="190 text-anchor="middle" font-size="8 fill="#fcd34d">Homoglyphs, spacing <text x="747 y="203" text-anchor="middle font-size="7" fill="#fcd34d>Image perturbations
<text" x="665" y="290 text-anchor="middle" font-size="10 fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444">Harmful content slips through! <text x="665 y="310" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b>Cause: Attackers adapt faster than models <text" x="665" y="330 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="var(--text-theme, #10b981">Fix: Adversarial training, user reports, ensemble
<text x="235 y="365" text-anchor="middle font-size="14" font-weight="bold fill="var(--text-theme, #8b5cf6">3. Reviewer Burnout
<text x="130 y="420" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="white>Review Queue <text" x="130" y="435 text-anchor="middle" font-size="8 fill="#c4b5fd">5000 pending <text x="130 y="448" text-anchor="middle font-size="7" fill="#c4b5fd>Growing
<text x="220 y="415" text-anchor="middle font-size="7" fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444>Overwhelms
<rect" x="245" y="395 width="140" height="60" rx="4" fill="var(--bg-theme, #ef4444)" stroke="var(--border-theme, #b91c1c)" stroke-width="2/> <text" x="315" y="420 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="white">Reviewer <text x="315 y="435" text-anchor="middle font-size="8" fill="#fca5a5>Burnout <text" x="315" y="448 text-anchor="middle" font-size="7 fill="#fca5a5">PTSD risk
<text x="235 y="495" text-anchor="middle font-size="10" fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444>Quality drops, errors increase! <text" x="235" y="515 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b">Cause: High volume, disturbing content <text x="235 y="535" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="var(--text-theme, #10b981>Fix: Rotation, limits, mental health support, more automation
<rect" x="460" y="340 width="410" height="240" rx="8" fill="white" stroke="var(--border-theme, #10b981)" stroke-width="2/> 4. Policy Inconsistency
<rect" x="480" y="380 width="370" height="140" rx="6" fill="var(--bg-panel-soft, #ecfdf5)" stroke="var(--border-theme, #6ee7b7)" stroke-width="1/>
<rect" x="490" y="395 width="100" height="60" rx="4" fill="var(--bg-theme, #10b981)" stroke="var(--border-theme, #059669)" stroke-width="1/> <text" x="540" y="420 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="white">Same Content <text x="540 y="435" text-anchor="middle font-size="8" fill="#6ee7b7>Submitted
<text x="610 y="415" text-anchor="middle font-size="7" fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b>Reviewer A
<rect" x="635" y="395 width="100" height="60" rx="4" fill="var(--bg-theme, #10b981)" stroke="var(--border-theme, #059669)" stroke-width="1/> <text" x="685" y="420 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="white">Allowed <text x="685 y="435" text-anchor="middle font-size="8" fill="#6ee7b7>Reviewer A
<text x="610 y="455" text-anchor="middle font-size="7" fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444>Reviewer B
<rect" x="635" y="435 width="100" height="60" rx="4" fill="var(--bg-theme, #ef4444)" stroke="var(--border-theme, #b91c1c)" stroke-width="2/> <text" x="685" y="460 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="white">Removed <text x="685 y="475" text-anchor="middle font-size="8" fill="#fca5a5>Reviewer B
<text" x="665" y="495 text-anchor="middle" font-size="10 fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444">Inconsistent enforcement erodes trust! <text x="665 y="515" text-anchor="middle font-size="9" fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b>Cause: Unclear policy, subjective judgment <text" x="665" y="535 text-anchor="middle" font-size="9 fill="var(--text-theme, #10b981">Fix: Clear guidelines, calibration, QA reviews
<marker id="arrow" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5 orient="auto"> <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7 fill="var(--text-theme, #64748b)"/>
<marker id="arrow-red" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="9" refY="3.5 orient="auto"> <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7 fill="var(--text-theme, #ef4444)"/>
